note: Mathlib/Combinatorics/SimpleGraph/Maps.lean:226 — abbrev induce (s : Set V) (G : SimpleGraph V) : SimpleGraph s, docstring: 'the subgraph induced by the given vertex set, a wrapper around comap'.
Mathlib/Combinatorics/Schnirelmann.lean:55 — noncomputable def schnirelmannDensity (A : Set ℕ) [DecidablePred (· ∈ A)] : ℝ, the standard |A ∩ [1,n]|/n limit-inf definition.

Mathlib/RingTheory/Radical/Basic.lean:148 def radical (a : M) : M := ∏ primes dividing a (to first power); Mathlib/RingTheory/Radical/NatInt.lean specializes/computes it for ℕ and ℤ (radical_eq_prod_primeFactors) matching the Wikipedia notion exactly.
Mathlib/Order/Defs/Unbundled.lean:324 — structure UpperSet (α) [LE α] where carrier : Set α; upper' : IsUpperSet carrier. Bundled type of upper sets, matches the order-theory concept.
